title: Allowing public ACLs or policies on a S3 bucket is security-sensitive
description: S3 buckets should be configured to block public access to prevent data breaches and unauthorized access. This includes blocking public ACLs, ignoring existing public ACLs, blocking public bucket policies, and restricting public bucket access. Failing to properly configure these settings can expose sensitive data to the internet.
recommendation: Configure S3 buckets to block all public access by setting blockPublicAcls, ignorePublicAcls, blockPublicPolicy, and restrictPublicBuckets to true. Use BlockPublicAccess.BLOCK_ALL for convenience.
impact: Data breaches, unauthorized access to sensitive information, and potential compliance violations

checks.message: S3 bucket allows public access. Configure blockPublicAccess settings to block public ACLs, policies, and access to prevent data exposure.
S3 bucket potentially allows public access. Missing or incomplete blockPublicAccess configuration detected.
